creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun May 18 07:32:35 2014
New Revision: 354403
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354403
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354403/

Log:
  - Update to 3.1
  
  PR:		187495
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/graphics/scale2x/Makefile
  head/graphics/scale2x/distinfo

Modified: head/graphics/scale2x/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/scale2x/Makefile	Sun May 18 07:31:40 2014	(r354402)
+++ head/graphics/scale2x/Makefile	Sun May 18 07:32:35 2014	(r354403)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	scale2x
-PORTVERSION=	3.0
+PORTVERSION=	3.1
 CATEGORIES=	graphics
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -18,15 +18,14 @@ GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CPPFLAGS+=	$$(libpng15-config --I_opts)
 LDFLAGS+=	$$(libpng15-config --L_opts)
 
-PORTDOCS=	*
 PORTEXAMPLES=	*
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/scalex bin/scalerx man/man1/scalex.1.gz \
-		man/man1/scalerx.1.gz
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/scalex bin/scalerx \
+		man/man1/scalex.1.gz man/man1/scalerx.1.gz
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS EXAMPLES
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=		EXAMPLES
 OPTIONS_DEFINE_i386=	MMX
 
-MMX_CPPFLAGS+=	-DHAVE_MMX
+MMX_CPPFLAGS=		-DHAVE_MMX
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
@@ -35,9 +34,8 @@ post-patch:
 		 s|__x86_64__|__amd64__|' ${WRKSRC}/*.[ch]
 
 post-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
-	(cd ${WRKSRC}/doc && ${INSTALL_DATA} *.html ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
-	(cd ${WRKSRC}/example && ${INSTALL_DATA} *.png ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR})
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/example && ${INSTALL_DATA} *.png \
+		${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR})
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/graphics/scale2x/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/scale2x/distinfo	Sun May 18 07:31:40 2014	(r354402)
+++ head/graphics/scale2x/distinfo	Sun May 18 07:32:35 2014	(r354403)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (scale2x-3.0.tar.gz) = 00cd8fb45a5d426149bec0b67104a260f5f8c3fc04ccf53c0d1133e13a36739e
-SIZE (scale2x-3.0.tar.gz) = 244737
+SHA256 (scale2x-3.1.tar.gz) = afdd88b90811b00ae884eb8a97355991f39d8028dbd5c6b1d95fdccf0fc56574
+SIZE (scale2x-3.1.tar.gz) = 244291
